title: Make Claude Accountable: Meet the ContextNest Plugin for Claude
excerpt: Claude starts every session cold, in Claude Code and in Cowork alike. The ContextNest plugin gives it a governed source of truth instead: it flags conflicts, queues every change for your approval, and cuts token costs 3x, per peer-reviewed research.
content_html:
Every Monday morning, somewhere in your company, someone opens Claude — in a terminal, in Cowork, it doesn't matter which — and starts teaching it the business. Again.

Here's the schema. Here's the security protocol. Here's why we never call that service directly, and why the pricing page hasn't matched the sales deck since March. Twenty minutes of re-briefing later, Claude is useful. By Tuesday, none of it survived the session.

That re-briefing tax is the cost you can see. The expensive one is invisible: Claude fills any gap in what you told it with whatever pattern looks plausible, and hands back an answer that sounds just as confident whether it's citing your actual policy or improvising one that merely sounds like it. Multiply that across every team and every session, and the business slowly drifts from what it actually decided — one convincing, unverified answer at a time.

The ContextNest plugin for Claude closes that gap. It installs the same way and behaves the same way whether your team runs Claude Code from a terminal or works out of Cowork — Claude stops guessing and starts working from a governed, version-controlled source of truth: retrieving from it, writing back to it, and flagging what's gone stale, without anyone leaving the conversation.

Search Finds Everything. It Doesn't Know What's Approved.

Enterprise search tools index everything — every Slack thread, every abandoned draft, every doc someone meant to delete. Indexed and authorized aren't the same thing. Point Claude at a flat folder of files and it can't tell your current security protocol from the one you retired eighteen months ago. Ask it a technical question and it will cite either one with identical confidence.

For developers: this is the difference between a folder Claude can search and a graph Claude can reason over. Search returns what matches the query. A governed vault returns what your org has actually approved, with a version history attached.

One Change Ripples Through Everything. You Steer Every Edit.

Knowledge doesn't change one document at a time. Rewrite a pricing tier and the sales deck goes stale. Update an API contract and three integration guides now describe endpoints that no longer exist. Revise a data-retention policy and the security runbook still points to the old rule. Change your positioning and half the site keeps repeating the line you just retired. In a folder of files, none of that connects — each document sits alone until someone stumbles onto the mismatch.

Because ContextNest links your knowledge as a graph, Claude sees those connections while it works. And instead of picking a side on its own, it surfaces the conflict and waits. Claude doesn't decide which version is correct. It flags what it found, applies the version you've already approved to the work in front of it, and holds everything else for you to resolve. The AI doesn't drive the change. You do.

This happened to us last week. While rebuilding a page, Claude surfaced a conflict between our messaging architecture doc and a newer ruling from a partner review, about how we describe our own technology — two documents, both marked authoritative, saying opposite things. Instead of picking one, Claude applied the newer ruling to the work in progress and queued the older document for me to reconcile.

Claude, mid-task

Before I finish this section, two nodes disagree. The canonical doc — strategy/messaging-architecture — still uses the old framing. A newer ruling in strategy/messaging-architecture-v10-draft overrides it, but that node is still in draft.

I applied the newer ruling to this page and left the canonical doc untouched. Queued for your review:

  • Five precise before/after edits to the copy in progress
  • One conflicting node flagged for reconciliation
  • Status: draft — nothing here is official yet

Review it, and when you say go, I'll apply the edits and retire the old draft.

A real exchange from a homepage rebuild, node names generalized.

That's the difference between a folder that stores answers and a vault that's actively maintained. A folder lets contradictions sit side by side indefinitely. A maintained vault surfaces them while they're still cheap to fix and keeps a person in the loop for every resolution, so the knowledge base evolves the way your team intended, not the way an AI guessed it should.

You Approve Every Change. Nothing Ships Without You.

None of this happens behind your back. Claude stewards the vault the way an editor stewards a publication: it accumulates a queue of proposed changes, and nothing becomes official until a person approves it.

  • Auto-retrieval. Relevant vault material gets pulled into every prompt as you work. The re-briefing is gone. Claude opens the session already knowing the business.
  • Auto-capture. At the end of each turn, new facts, decisions, and edge cases get written back to the vault. Today, that knowledge dies in the chat window. This makes it permanent.
  • Drift surfacing. When new work exposes a stale or conflicting document, Claude stages a suggested update in the review queue instead of papering over it.
  • Approval, always. Suggestions sit in the queue until someone accepts or rejects them. Draft stays draft. Official means a person said so.

For developers: every suggestion is a diff against a version-controlled Markdown node, carrying its own checksum, not a black-box edit you have to take on faith. Run ctx verify against the vault any time you want to confirm nothing changed outside the approval queue.

The economics reward the discipline too. Curated, version-controlled context means Claude pulls exactly what it needs instead of searching through everything anyone has ever written. In peer-reviewed research PromptOwl co-authored with Emory University and IBM Research, structured retrieval hit 97% answer accuracy at 215 tokens per query, against 90% accuracy at 725 tokens for standard sparse retrieval — a 3× cut in token cost alongside higher accuracy, not a tradeoff between them. Maintain the vault once, and every session after runs faster, cheaper, and closer to what's actually true.

Watch the Walkthrough

This short walkthrough covers installation in Claude Code and shows Claude pulling approved knowledge from the vault on the fly. The install steps are identical if you run it from Cowork instead.

The Setup Is Two Slash Commands

No MCP wiring, no infrastructure ticket, no separate build for the desktop app. Install it directly in the chat — the same two commands whether you're running Claude Code from a terminal or working in Cowork:

/plugin marketplace add promptowl/contextnest
/plugin install contextnest

On enable, four settings: retrieval effort (from a quick search to full graph reasoning), auto-capture (on by default), an optional pinned vault, and a ctx binary override. Leave the vault unpinned and Claude picks the relevant one automatically. The plugin runs on the open-source ContextNest CLI, free to install for any team, and when you want shared stewardship over one vault across the org, the Community Edition server adds that at no cost too.

Your vault stops rotting and starts compounding. Every session leaves it a little more current than it found it, every ripple surfaces while it's still cheap to fix, and every change waits for you to say go instead of an AI's best guess. The version history is there if compliance ever asks — but the real payoff is a knowledge base you can trust, because you're the one steering it, edit by edit.

This whole vault starts with one command. About 10 minutes from empty folder to first skill:

$ npx @promptowl/contextnest-cli init

sentences.en: None of this happens behind your back.
sentences.zh: 这一切都不会在你背后发生。

sentences.en: Claude stewards the vault the way an editor stewards a publication: it accumulates a queue of proposed changes, and nothing becomes official until a person approves it.
sentences.zh: 克劳德管理金库的方式就像编辑管理出版物一样：它积累了一系列拟议的更改，在有人批准之前，任何内容都不会成为正式的。

blocks.html_en: • Auto-retrieval. Relevant vault material gets pulled into every prompt as you work. The re-briefing is gone. Claude opens the session already knowing the business.

sentences.en: Auto-retrieval.
sentences.zh: 自动检索。

sentences.en: Relevant vault material gets pulled into every prompt as you work.
sentences.zh: 当您工作时，相关的金库材料会被拉入每个提示中。

sentences.en: The re-briefing is gone.
sentences.zh: 重新通报已经消失了。

sentences.en: Claude opens the session already knowing the business.
sentences.zh: 克劳德在开始会议时已经了解了业务。

blocks.html_en: • Auto-capture. At the end of each turn, new facts, decisions, and edge cases get written back to the vault. Today, that knowledge dies in the chat window. This makes it permanent.

sentences.en: Auto-capture.
sentences.zh: 自动捕捉。

sentences.en: At the end of each turn, new facts, decisions, and edge cases get written back to the vault.
sentences.zh: 在每个回合结束时，新的事实、决策和边缘案例都会被写回金库。

sentences.en: Today, that knowledge dies in the chat window.
sentences.zh: 如今，这些知识在聊天窗口中消失了。

sentences.en: This makes it permanent.
sentences.zh: 这使其成为永久性的。

blocks.html_en: • Drift surfacing. When new work exposes a stale or conflicting document, Claude stages a suggested update in the review queue instead of papering over it.

sentences.en: Drift surfacing.
sentences.zh: 漂移铺面。

sentences.en: When new work exposes a stale or conflicting document, Claude stages a suggested update in the review queue instead of papering over it.
sentences.zh: 当新的工作暴露出过时或有冲突的文档时，克劳德会在审阅队列中提出建议的更新，而不是掩盖它。

blocks.html_en: • Approval, always. Suggestions sit in the queue until someone accepts or rejects them. Draft stays draft. Official means a person said so.

sentences.en: Approval, always.
sentences.zh: 批准，永远。

sentences.en: Suggestions sit in the queue until someone accepts or rejects them.
sentences.zh: 建议会排队等待有人接受或拒绝。

sentences.en: Draft stays draft.
sentences.zh: 草稿仍是草稿。

sentences.en: Official means a person said so.
sentences.zh: 官方是指一个人这么说的。

blocks.html_en: For developers: every suggestion is a diff against a version-controlled Markdown node, carrying its own checksum, not a black-box edit you have to take on faith. Run ctx verify against the vault any time you want to confirm nothing changed outside the approval queue.

sentences.en: For developers: every suggestion is a diff against a version-controlled Markdown node, carrying its own checksum, not a black-box edit you have to take on faith.
sentences.zh: 对于开发人员来说：每个建议都是与版本控制的 Markdown 节点的差异，带有自己的校验和，而不是您必须相信的黑盒编辑。

sentences.en: Run ctx verify against the vault any time you want to confirm nothing changed outside the approval queue.
sentences.zh: 每当您想要确认批准队列之外没有任何更改时，请对保管库运行 ctx verify。

blocks.html_en: The economics reward the discipline too. Curated, version-controlled context means Claude pulls exactly what it needs instead of searching through everything anyone has ever written. In peer-reviewed research PromptOwl co-authored with Emory University and IBM Research, structured retrieval hit 97% answer accuracy at 215 tokens per query, against 90% accuracy at 725 tokens for standard sparse retrieval — a 3× cut in token cost alongside higher accuracy, not a tradeoff between them. Maintain the vault once, and every session after runs faster, cheaper, and closer to what's actually true.

sentences.en: The economics reward the discipline too.
sentences.zh: 经济学也奖励纪律。

sentences.en: Curated, version-controlled context means Claude pulls exactly what it needs instead of searching through everything anyone has ever written.
sentences.zh: 精心策划、版本控制的上下文意味着 Claude 可以准确提取所需内容，而不是搜索任何人曾经编写过的所有内容。

sentences.en: In peer-reviewed research PromptOwl co-authored with Emory University and IBM Research, structured retrieval hit 97% answer accuracy at 215 tokens per query, against 90% accuracy at 725 tokens for standard sparse retrieval — a 3× cut in token cost alongside higher accuracy, not a tradeoff between them.
sentences.zh: 在 PromptOwl 与埃默里大学和 IBM 研究中心共同撰写的同行评审研究中，结构化检索在每次查询 215 个标记时达到了 97% 的答案准确率，而标准稀疏检索在 725 个标记时的准确率达到 90% — 标记成本降低了 3 倍，同时准确性更高，而不是两者之间的权衡。

sentences.en: Maintain the vault once, and every session after runs faster, cheaper, and closer to what's actually true.
sentences.zh: 维护一次金库，之后的每个会话都会运行得更快、更便宜，并且更接近实际情况。

blocks.html_en: Watch the Walkthrough

sentences.en: Watch the Walkthrough
sentences.zh: 观看演练

blocks.html_en: This short walkthrough covers installation in Claude Code and shows Claude pulling approved knowledge from the vault on the fly. The install steps are identical if you run it from Cowork instead.

sentences.en: This short walkthrough covers installation in Claude Code and shows Claude pulling approved knowledge from the vault on the fly.
sentences.zh: 这个简短的演练涵盖了 Claude Code 中的安装，并展示了 Claude 从 Vault 中动态提取经过批准的知识。

sentences.en: The install steps are identical if you run it from Cowork instead.
sentences.zh: 如果您从 Cowork 运行它，安装步骤是相同的​​。

blocks.html_en: The Setup Is Two Slash Commands

sentences.en: The Setup Is Two Slash Commands
sentences.zh: 设置是两个斜杠命令

blocks.html_en: No MCP wiring, no infrastructure ticket, no separate build for the desktop app. Install it directly in the chat — the same two commands whether you're running Claude Code from a terminal or working in Cowork:

sentences.en: No MCP wiring, no infrastructure ticket, no separate build for the desktop app.
sentences.zh: 无需 MCP 布线，无需基础设施票证，无需单独构建桌面应用程序。

sentences.en: Install it directly in the chat — the same two commands whether you're running Claude Code from a terminal or working in Cowork:
sentences.zh: 直接在聊天中安装它 - 无论您是从终端运行 Claude Code 还是在 Cowork 中工作，都使用相同的两个命令：

blocks.html_en: On enable, four settings: retrieval effort (from a quick search to full graph reasoning), auto-capture (on by default), an optional pinned vault, and a ctx binary override. Leave the vault unpinned and Claude picks the relevant one automatically. The plugin runs on the open-source ContextNest CLI, free to install for any team, and when you want shared stewardship over one vault across the org, the Community Edition server adds that at no cost too.

sentences.en: On enable, four settings: retrieval effort (from a quick search to full graph reasoning), auto-capture (on by default), an optional pinned vault, and a ctx binary override.
sentences.zh: 启用后，有四种设置：检索工作（从快速搜索到完整图形推理）、自动捕获（默认情况下打开）、可选的固定保管库和 ctx 二进制覆盖。

sentences.en: Leave the vault unpinned and Claude picks the relevant one automatically.
sentences.zh: 如果不固定保险库，克劳德会自动选择相关的保险库。

sentences.en: The plugin runs on the open-source ContextNest CLI, free to install for any team, and when you want shared stewardship over one vault across the org, the Community Edition server adds that at no cost too.
sentences.zh: 该插件在开源 ContextNest CLI 上运行，任何团队都可以免费安装，当您希望在整个组织中共享一个保管库的管理权时，社区版服务器也可以免费添加这一功能。

blocks.html_en: Your vault stops rotting and starts compounding. Every session leaves it a little more current than it found it, every ripple surfaces while it's still cheap to fix, and every change waits for you to say go instead of an AI's best guess. The version history is there if compliance ever asks — but the real payoff is a knowledge base you can trust, because you're the one steering it, edit by edit.

sentences.en: Your vault stops rotting and starts compounding.
sentences.zh: 你的金库停止腐烂并开始复利。

sentences.en: Every session leaves it a little more current than it found it, every ripple surfaces while it's still cheap to fix, and every change waits for you to say go instead of an AI's best guess.
sentences.zh: 每一次会话都会让它比发现时更新一点，每一次涟漪都会浮现，而修复起来仍然很便宜，每一次改变都在等待你说“去”，而不是人工智能的最佳猜测。

sentences.en: The version history is there if compliance ever asks — but the real payoff is a knowledge base you can trust, because you're the one steering it, edit by edit.
sentences.zh: 如果合规性要求，版本历史记录就在那里，但真正的回报是您可以信任的知识库，因为您是控制它的人，逐个编辑。

blocks.html_en: This whole vault starts with one command. About 10 minutes from empty folder to first skill:

sentences.en: This whole vault starts with one command.
sentences.zh: 整个保险库从一个命令开始。

sentences.en: About 10 minutes from empty folder to first skill:
sentences.zh: 从空文件夹到第一个技能大约10分钟：

blocks.html_en: $ npx @promptowl/contextnest-cli init

sentences.en: $ npx @promptowl/contextnest-cli init

content_html_zh:
每个星期一早上，在你公司的某个地方，有人会打开 Claude——在终端中，在 Cowork 中，无论是在哪一个——并开始教它业务。 再次。

这是架构。 这是安全协议。 这就是为什么我们从不直接调用该服务，以及为什么自三月份以来定价页面与销售平台不匹配的原因。 二十分钟后的重新汇报，克劳德很有用。 到周二，所有这些都没有在会议中幸存下来。

重新通报税是您可以看到的成本。 昂贵的答案是看不见的：克劳德用任何看起来合理的模式来填补你所说的任何空白，并返回一个听起来同样自信的答案，无论是引用你的实际政策还是只是听起来像的临时政策。 将其乘以每个团队和每次会议，业务就会慢慢偏离其实际决定——一次给出一个令人信服的、未经验证的答案。

Claude 的 ContextNest 插件弥补了这一差距。 无论您的团队是从终端运行 Claude Code 还是在 Cowork 中工作，它的安装方式和行为方式都是相同的 — Claude 停止猜测，并开始从受管理、版本控制的事实来源开始工作：从中检索、写回并标记过时的内容，而无需任何人离开对话。

搜索找到一切。 它不知道什么被批准了。

企业搜索工具对所有内容进行索引——每个 Slack 线程、每个废弃的草稿、每个要删除的文档。 索引和授权不是一回事。 将 Claude 指向一个包含文件的平面文件夹，它无法区分您当前的安全协议和十八个月前停用的安全协议。 问它一个技术问题，它会以相同的信心引用其中一个问题。

对于开发人员来说：这是 Claude 可以搜索的文件夹和 Claude 可以推理的图表之间的区别。 搜索返回与查询匹配的内容。 受管理的保管库返回您的组织实际批准的内容，并附加版本历史记录。

一次改变波及一切。 您掌控每一次编辑。

知识不会一次改变一份文档。 重写定价层，销售平台就会变得陈旧。 更新 API 合同和三个集成指南现在描述了不再存在的端点。 修改数据保留策略，安全操作手册仍然指向旧规则。 改变你的定位，一半的网站就会不断重复你刚刚退出的路线。 在一个文件文件夹中，所有这些都没有联系——每个文档都是单独放置的，直到有人偶然发现不匹配的地方。

因为 ContextNest 将您的知识以图表的形式链接起来，所以克劳德可以在工作时看到这些联系。 它并没有自行选择立场，而是将冲突暴露出来并等待。 克劳德不确定哪个版本是正确的。 它会标记所发现的内容，将您已经批准的版本应用于前面的工作，并保存其他所有内容供您解决。 人工智能不会推动变革。 你做。

这上周发生在我们身上。 在重建页面时，克劳德发现了我们的消息传递架构文档与合作伙伴审查的最新裁决之间的冲突，该裁决涉及我们如何描述我们自己的技术——两份文档都标有权威性，但内容相反。 克劳德没有选择其中一个，而是将新的裁决应用于正在进行的工作，并将旧的文件排队等待我进行核对。

克劳德，任务中

在我完成本节之前，两个节点存在分歧。 规范文档——策略/消息传递架构——仍然使用旧的框架。 Strategy/messaging-architecture-v10-draft 中的较新裁决会覆盖它，但该节点仍处于草稿状态。

我将新的裁决应用于此页面，并保持规范文档不变。 排队等待您的评论：

  • 对正在进行的副本进行五次精确的前后编辑
  • 一个冲突节点被标记为需要协调
  • 状态：草案——尚未正式发布

审查它，当你说开始时，我将应用编辑并废弃旧草稿。

主页重建的真实交换，节点名称通用化。

这就是存储答案的文件夹和主动维护的保管库之间的区别。 文件夹让矛盾无限期地并存。 维护好的保险库可以在修复成本仍然较低的情况下将它们显示出来，并让人们了解每个解决方案，因此知识库会按照您的团队预期的方式发展，而不是按照人工智能猜测的方式发展。

您批准每一项更改。 没有你，一切都无法实现。

这一切都不会在你背后发生。 克劳德管理金库的方式就像编辑管理出版物一样：它积累了一系列拟议的更改，在有人批准之前，任何内容都不会成为正式的。

  • 自动检索。 当您工作时，相关的金库材料会被拉入每个提示中。 重新通报已经消失了。 克劳德在开始会议时已经了解了业务。
  • 自动捕捉。 在每个回合结束时，新的事实、决策和边缘案例都会被写回金库。 如今，这些知识在聊天窗口中消失了。 这使其成为永久性的。
  • 漂移铺面。 当新的工作暴露出过时或有冲突的文档时，克劳德会在审阅队列中提出建议的更新，而不是掩盖它。
  • 批准，永远。 建议会排队等待有人接受或拒绝。 草稿仍是草稿。 官方是指一个人这么说的。

对于开发人员来说：每个建议都是与版本控制的 Markdown 节点的差异，带有自己的校验和，而不是您必须相信的黑盒编辑。 每当您想要确认批准队列之外没有任何更改时，请对保管库运行 ctx verify。

经济学也奖励纪律。 精心策划、版本控制的上下文意味着 Claude 可以准确提取所需内容，而不是搜索任何人曾经编写过的所有内容。 在 PromptOwl 与埃默里大学和 IBM 研究中心共同撰写的同行评审研究中，结构化检索在每次查询 215 个标记时达到了 97% 的答案准确率，而标准稀疏检索在 725 个标记时的准确率达到 90% — 标记成本降低了 3 倍，同时准确性更高，而不是两者之间的权衡。 维护一次金库，之后的每个会话都会运行得更快、更便宜，并且更接近实际情况。

观看演练

这个简短的演练涵盖了 Claude Code 中的安装，并展示了 Claude 从 Vault 中动态提取经过批准的知识。 如果您从 Cowork 运行它，安装步骤是相同的​​。

设置是两个斜杠命令

无需 MCP 布线，无需基础设施票证，无需单独构建桌面应用程序。 直接在聊天中安装它 - 无论您是从终端运行 Claude Code 还是在 Cowork 中工作，都使用相同的两个命令：

/plugin marketplace add promptowl/contextnest
/plugin install contextnest

启用后，有四种设置：检索工作（从快速搜索到完整图形推理）、自动捕获（默认情况下打开）、可选的固定保管库和 ctx 二进制覆盖。 如果不固定保险库，克劳德会自动选择相关的保险库。 该插件在开源 ContextNest CLI 上运行，任何团队都可以免费安装，当您希望在整个组织中共享一个保管库的管理权时，社区版服务器也可以免费添加这一功能。

你的金库停止腐烂并开始复利。 每一次会话都会让它比发现时更新一点，每一次涟漪都会浮现，而修复起来仍然很便宜，每一次改变都在等待你说“去”，而不是人工智能的最佳猜测。 如果合规性要求，版本历史记录就在那里，但真正的回报是您可以信任的知识库，因为您是控制它的人，逐个编辑。

整个保险库从一个命令开始。 从空文件夹到第一个技能大约10分钟：

$ npx @promptowl/contextnest-cli init
